Structured capital. Measured ambition.
May 06, 2026

To commercial mortgage brokers,

You spend your career building a reputation. A single transaction gone wrong can erase it. That's why you choose your lenders with the same care your clients choose you.

Norvex Capital was built for brokers who think in years, not in transactions. A lender-partner whose infrastructure, discipline and speed protect your name on every file.

Here's what that means, concretely:

— Your clients are treated as institutional. Letter of intent in thirty minutes via our proprietary Norvex Score. Final decision in under five days. Funded in three to four weeks.

— Your file is followed by a dedicated agent. You receive key updates automatically (receipt, status, questions, final decision). You no longer have to chase the lender or re-explain the file ten times.

— Your compensation is secured by written agreement, negotiated per file, paid at disbursement at the notary. No haggling. No surprise.

Norvex Capital is not a traditional lender. We are a technology platform for private real estate financing powered by proprietary artificial intelligence — the only one in Canada. Our infrastructure is what makes the speed possible. And it's what no bank, no traditional private lender can copy.

▶  Broker Partner Program · 50s
WHAT YOUR CLIENTS RECEIVE
  • ♦Score Norvex™ — proprietary AI, LOI in 30 minutes ready to present
  • ♦Norvex Intel™ — proprietary AI analysis in 3 approaches (income, comparables, cost) that validates and completes the initial appraisal internally. Your client provides a baseline appraisal at standard market rates; no second appraisal billed by us, no additional 3-to-6 week delay for our validation
  • ♦Norvex Cost Analyzer™ — complete and automated cost breakdown
  • ♦Norvex Track™ — real-time construction monitoring for construction files
  • ♦Norvex Brain™ — central management system: full traceability, auditability, integrated accounting
  • ♦Client Portal (PWA) — your client tracks their file 24/7 on their phone
  • ♦Final decision in 5 business days (vs 4-8 weeks at an institution)
WHAT YOU RECEIVE AS A PARTNER BROKER
  • ♦Transparent and competitive compensation, paid at closing, without delay. The full commission grid is shared upon acceptance of your application
  • ♦Dedicated follow-up agent — for every file you refer to us, you automatically receive key updates (receipt, status, questions, final decision). Client confidentiality preserved at all times
  • ♦Dedicated human point of contact — direct line to leadership, priority availability
  • ♦Pro tools included: LOI generator, investor summaries, deal cards
  • ♦Complex files welcome: difficult credit, self-employed, tight timelines, commercial/multi-residential/industrial construction, development, acquisition of revenue properties, land financing, refinancing, bridge loans, discharged consumer proposals
  • ♦Financings from CA$2.5M to CA$100M, rates 10-12%, fees 3-3.5% (collected at notary, exclusively to Capital Norvex) — Quebec & Ontario

Our leadership has structured over CA$200M of private financing annually. But it's our technology infrastructure that makes the difference: no lender — private or institutional — offers LOI in 30 min + internal appraisal included + real-time construction monitoring + PWA portals.

When you refer a client to Capital Norvex, you're not selling a loan. You're offering the full Norvex ecosystem.

EXCLUSIVE PROGRAM · BY APPLICATION

Capital Norvex selects a limited number of partner brokers. Submit your application; we review each file individually and, upon acceptance, share the full commission grid and the broker agreement.
